title: Foreign Keys Not Showing in Public ERD View
story: As a DataTools Pro user opening a public ERD view, I want to see foreign keys in the default view, so that available relationships are immediately visible without toggling settings.
description:
## Bug
When opening a public ERD view via a direct URL, the foreign keys do not appear in the default view. The expected behavior is for FK fields to be visible so that available relationships are shown to viewers.

## Context
The issue only reproduces in production; it works correctly on localhost. This suggests a deployment or caching difference between environments.
acceptance_criteria: Foreign keys are visible in the default public ERD view
Public ERD view URL renders correctly in production
ux_changes: Foreign keys should appear by default in public ERD views.
middleware_changes: Investigation into production-specific rendering issue for public ERD view FK visibility.
implementation_notes: Works on localhost but not production — likely a deployment, caching, or environment configuration difference. Developer investigating.
comment_summary: Developer acknowledged the task but noted it would take extra time since the issue only reproduces in production, not localhost.
